title: autobench.adversarial.curveball_generated v1
description: One LLM-generated adversarial test case produced by the Code-A1 / SAGE adversarial dual. Emitted per call to AdversarialGenerator.generate_curveball. Carries enough metadata (gotcha, failure mode, generator model, prompt preview) for downstream consumers to cluster curveballs without re-reading the full prompt.

session_id.description: ULID for the autobench session that owns this curveball.

case_id.description: Curveball identifier (prefixed 'adv-' followed by a ULID).

gotcha.description: One-sentence description of the trap the generator set.

target_failure_mode.description: The failure mode the generator was steered toward (e.g. integer_overflow, empty_input). Absent when the generator chose freely.

generator_model.description: Model identifier (e.g. MiniMax-M2.7). 'fallback_static' when the LLM call failed and the static template fired.

prompt_preview.description: First 200 characters of the generated problem statement.
